overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a survivor character exploring a pristine wilderness area with rocky streams and waterfalls. The character wades through shallow water toward a multi-tiered waterfall, circles the basin, and exits toward abandoned wooden camp structures in a sunlit forest environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed with scattered boulders and pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow stream water toward a distant waterfall visible between rock formations

entered.detail: massive gray boulders lining the left side of the stream
tall evergreen tree with dense foliage on the right bank
clear shallow water with visible rocky bottom
multi-tiered waterfall cascading down distant cliff face
rocky mountain peaks visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a shallow rocky stream surrounded by large boulders on the left and pine trees on the right. The camera follows from behind as the character heads toward a distant waterfall visible between the rock formations in the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall approach with wooden debris and deepening water

events.description: character wades into deeper water creating larger splashes and ripples
water color shifts to turquoise as depth increases near waterfall basin

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through progressively deepening water toward the waterfall, passing wooden barriers on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden barrier with black tire attached, partially submerged in water
rocky outcrop forming a ledge along the left side of the stream

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the waterfall, wading through progressively deeper water that shifts to a turquoise hue. A wooden barrier with a tire becomes visible on the right as the initial large rock formations pass out of view behind, and the waterfall grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall basin with deep turquoise water and rocky cliffs

events.description: character turns left to circle around the waterfall basin and view the falls from the side
sun glare becomes visible as camera angle shifts toward the light source

agents.ego_description: circling the waterfall basin counter-clockwise, exploring the deep water area and viewing the falls from different angles

entered.detail: steep vertical rock wall with water runoff patterns and moss
large decaying tree trunk partially submerged in the water

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to circle the waterfall basin, revealing steep cliff faces on the right and sun glare from above. The wooden barrier passes behind as the character explores the deep turquoise water, with the waterfall now visible to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned camp with wooden fortifications and rocky terrain

events.description: character exits the water onto rocky shore and begins ascending toward land
character begins ascending slight incline toward abandoned wooden structures

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water onto rocky ground and approaching abandoned wooden camp structures on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden walls and barriers suggesting a former survival camp
rocky trail leading through grass and boulders away from the water
massive rounded rock formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the water onto a rocky shore and begins ascending toward abandoned wooden fortifications. The waterfall and cliff face disappear from view as the character follows a dirt path through boulders and pine trees toward the weathered camp ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shallow rocky stream toward a towering waterfall and eventually into a secluded forest camp. It begins with the character wading through a stream flanked by large boulders and pine trees under a bright midday sun. As the character advances, the water deepens and shifts to a vibrant turquoise hue, passing a wooden barrier with a tire as the waterfall grows larger in the frame. The scene then shifts as the character turns to circle the basin, revealing steep cliff faces and bright sun glare before the waterfall recedes to the left. Finally, the camera follows the character as they exit the water onto a rocky shore and ascend a dirt path, leaving the cliffs behind to approach weathered wooden fortifications nestled among the trees.
